text: [S_0] ("2026-01-01", "Patient arrives at ER due to presentation of dyspnoea at the end of their dialysis session Also reports stabbing chest pain for about 4/5 days, radiating to the abdomen Poorly functioning bowel Swab for SARS CoV2 performed on 11/28 negative Completed SARS CoV2 vaccination.", 0.0, 0.1) | [S_1] ("2026-01-01", "(4 doses) Past Medical History - Arterial hypertension - Overweight - Dyslipidemia - Subclinical carotid vasculopathy - Stage V CRI on dialysis, preserved diuresis - thrice-weekly dialysis - CAD.", 0.0, 0.5) | [S_2] ("2026-01-01", "triple vessel CAD, PTA with medicated stent of the medial LAD and PL branch of proximal CX and PTA and medicated stent on proximal RCA (reported recent hospitalization in Cardiology for angioplasty, 3 weeks ago) - COPD with LTOT 2 l/min - Benign pituitary adenoma - Anxiety syndrome with previous panic attacks - BPH - Hiatal hernia Therapy: ASA 100 mg, atorvastatin 20 mg, mcg x 2, pantoprazole 20 mg, movicol, bromazepam ab, trinitrine 0.3 mg tablet as needed, renvela 1/2 sachet x2, trimbow 2 inhalations x2, urorec, avodart, aerosol with 1 vial fluibron and clenil, Nobistar 1/2 tablet, Monoket 20 1/2 tablet x3, clopidrogel Disepavit 1 injection 2 times/week (Monday, Friday), Parsabiv, Binocrit REPORTS NO KNOWN DRUG ALLERGIES", 0.0, 0.5)
